name: Multikey Shortcuts
author: Danhawk
description: Sequential hotkey launcher — press a two-key chord to open apps and websites instantly.
details:
# Multikey Shortcuts

Sequential hotkey launcher — press a two-key chord to open apps and websites instantly.

## How it works
- Press the first chord — a small tooltip shows available keys
- Press the second key within 2 seconds to fire
- Press anything else — sequence cancels silently

## Managing Shortcuts
Click **Manage Shortcuts** (when installed) to add, edit or remove shortcuts for apps, links and folders.

## Engine
Powered by bundled AutoHotkey64.exe — no installation needed.

changes: Initial release — manage shortcuts via the built-in Shortcut Manager
